Description: This registry defines the messages for delta energy systems power shelves.

xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.B.Description: A battery backup unit was inserted.

xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.S.Description: PSU FW update started successfuly.
xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.S.Message: Started PSU FW update to version %1. All applicable PSUs will be updated, one at a time. Each PSU will turn off for a short time, so do not increase the power over the maximum output power of the shelf!

xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.S.Description: The power shelf detected less PSUs than what is needed for redundancy.
xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.S.Message: Not enough power-delivering PSUs available for redundancy mode. Expected number of working PSUs is %1, available are %2 or less.

xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.S.Description: Resolved: The power shelf detected less PSUs than what is needed for redundancy.
xyz.openbmc_project.DeltaEnergySystems.S.Message: Resolved: Not enough power-delivering PSUs available for redundancy mode. Expected number of working PSUs is %1, available are %2 or less.
